title: pyrus folgneri
intro: Pyrus folgneri, also known as the Japanese mountain apple or mountain haw, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's bark, leaves, and fruit have been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and are also said to have antiseptic and antibacterial properties. The leaves and bark of the Pyrus folgneri plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
